author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Shipped DESIGN-CROSSLINK-OPS.md in 06196c99 at the repo root. 692 lines. Earlier result comments on this issue reflected the design-doc rename (OPS → DASHBOARD); the actually-asked followup was the operator runbook, which is what landed here. Paired with DESIGN-CROSSLINK-DASHBOARD.md it forms a two-doc set: design (why) + ops (how).
